name: redcube-ai
description: Codex plugin carrier for the RCA visual deliverable domain app; the canonical OPL package id is rca.

interface.shortDescription: Visual deliverable domain app for Codex.
interface.longDescription: Adds the redcube-ai Codex carrier for canonical OPL package rca while routing generated status/session/manifest wrappers through OPL and preserving direct product invoke plus domain-handler export/dispatch targets.
defaultPrompt: Read the RedCube AI domain-handler export for this workspace.
Inspect the current OPL generated product-entry refs for RedCube AI.
Continue the active RedCube deliverable loop in the same entry session.
